heading: Definitions
label: 590j Definitions

Amendments2008—, amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The term ‘agricultural commodity’ as used in this chapter means any such commodity and any regional or market classification, type, or grade thereof.”Pub. L. 110–246, § 2802(b)

children.label: B
children.text: any regional or market classification, type, or grade of an agricultural commodity.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “technical assistance” means technical expertise, information, and tools necessary for the conservation of natural resources on land active in agricultural, forestry, or related uses.

children.label: i
children.text: technical services provided directly to farmers, ranchers, and other eligible entities, such as conservation planning, technical consultation, and assistance with design and implementation of conservation practices; and

children.label: ii
children.text: technical infrastructure, including activities, processes, tools, and agency functions needed to support delivery of technical services, such as technical standards, resource inventories, training, data, technology, monitoring, and effects analyses.
